meta.description: Selected architectural millwork projects from across Canada.

hero.description: Explore our recent millwork installations across commercial, retail, healthcare, and institutional environments.

empty: No projects found matching your criteria.

cta.title: Have a project in mind?
cta.body: Let's discuss how Sandha Woodworks can deliver precision millwork for your next build.

detail.ctaTitle: Let's bring the same craftsmanship to your next build.

coffee-island-toronto.scope: Full turnkey build-out — kitchen/tech fit-out, custom feature ceilings (yellow bulkhead & lighting), stainless & diamond-plate service counter, back-bar millwork, retail display shelving & merchandising fixtures, banquettes, window counters, storefront graphics, and all interior furniture.

niagara-college-marotta.scope: Institutional interior scope — feature perforated metal ceilings (interior & exterior soffit), signage wall, glass-walled study rooms, common-area casework, and lounge/cafeteria furniture package throughout the innovation complex and athletics wing.

university-of-toronto-robarts.scope: Heritage-sensitive architectural millwork within Robarts Library — white oak column cladding, study carrels & partitions, upholstered banquette pods, individual workstation runs, reception & service casework, integrated task lighting and cable management.

tiffany-hill-primary-school.scope: K-8 school interior millwork — maple learning-stair bleachers, display cases, tiered wood cladding, reception & administration casework, teacher mail cubbies, classroom cabinetry & cubbies, window benches, recycling stations, and STEAM/music/art zone feature walls.

tobin-high-school.scope: Full high school interior millwork package — auditorium acoustic wood wall panels & curved balcony fascia, science lab casework with epoxy tops and integrated sinks, chemistry classroom cabinetry, teacher prep rooms, student lockers & wardrobe units, main lobby reception desk, corridor slat wood ceilings and glulam feature bulkheads.

scooped-by-demetres.scope: Complete mall parlour build-out — arched storefront, custom tiled service counter with curved glass gelato display, illuminated signage backing, back-of-house prep, menu boards, pint display freezer surround, and all finish carpentry.

mercato-mississauga.scope: Complete architectural millwork package — arched wood portals, banquettes, custom bar, cane-panel screens, feature ceilings, wine displays, service stations, and washroom millwork.

lake-country-coop.scope: Architectural millwork package, feature walls, casework, reception & public areas.

am-hair-beauty.scope: Retail fixtures, custom stations, reception & display millwork.

valley-park-library.scope: Library casework, circulation, feature millwork, stack & admin areas.
